title: Replace cond with case on a single value
prompt: Refactor this function: `def http_status_name(code) do cond do code == 200 -> "OK"; code == 404 -> "Not Found"; code == 500 -> "Server Error"; true -> "Unknown" end end`. Use `case code do ... end` with literal patterns. Output a complete `defmodule MyApp.HttpLabels do ... end`.
tier_rationale: Single direction refactor. The `cond` with equality comparisons on a single value is a textbook anti-pattern.
